title: Towards Next-Generation SLAM: A Survey on 3DGS-SLAM Focusing on Performance, Robustness, and Future Directions
abstract: 传统同步定位与建图系统常面临渲染质量粗糙、场景细节还原不足及动态环境鲁棒性差等局限。三维高斯泼溅凭借其高效的显式表征与高质量渲染能力，为SLAM提供了全新的重建范式。本文系统梳理了三维高斯泼溅与SLAM融合的关键技术路径，从渲染质量、跟踪精度、重建速度与内存消耗四个核心维度剖析代表性方法的性能优化策略，深入探讨其设计原理与突破方向。同时，针对运动模糊、动态环境等复杂场景，本文考察了提升三维高斯泼溅-SLAM系统鲁棒性的技术方案。最后，展望该领域未来面临的挑战与发展趋势。本综述旨在为研究者提供技术参照，推动构建兼具高保真、高效率与强鲁棒特性的新一代SLAM系统。
preview_text: Traditional Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) systems often face limitations including coarse rendering quality, insufficient recovery of scene details, and poor robustness in dynamic environments. 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), with its efficient explicit representation and high-quality rendering capabilities, offers a new reconstruction paradigm for SLAM. This survey comprehensively reviews key technical approaches for integrating 3DGS with SLAM. We analyze performance optimization of representative methods across four critical dimensions: rendering quality, tracking accuracy, reconstruction speed, and memory consumption, delving into their design principles and breakthroughs. Furthermore, we examine methods for enhancing the robustness of 3DGS-SLAM in complex environments such as motion blur and dynamic environments. Finally, we discuss future challenges and development trends in this area. This survey aims to provide a technical reference for researchers and foster the development of next-generation SLAM systems characterized by high fidelity, efficiency, and robustness.
one_line_summary: 这篇论文综述了3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）在SLAM中的应用，专注于渲染质量、跟踪精度、重建速度和内存消耗的性能优化，以及动态环境中的鲁棒性增强，与强化学习、VLA、机器人控制等关键词无直接关联。
